name: Summa Silver Corp.
description: Summa Silver Corp. is a Canadian junior mineral exploration company focused on the acquisition, exploration, and development of high-grade silver and gold projects in the United States. The company holds a 100% interest in two primary assets: the Hughes property located in central Nevada and the Mogollon property situated in southwestern New Mexico. By targeting historically productive mining districts, Summa Silver aims to advance these properties through systematic exploration and drilling programs to unlock significant mineral value for its shareholders.
